backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with user profile management, student records (streaks, quiz scores, badges), and access-controlled endpoints using a mixin-based authorization system.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (splash screen, landing page, auth, dashboard, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of four frontend source files: InteractiveQuizzes, EducationTools, AboutPage, and index.css.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vedansh Education & Technology React app, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes split into public (splash, landing, auth, about) and authenticated (dashboard, academic, quizzes, etc.) layout groups.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavBar.tsx: Fixed bottom navigation bar for authenticated pages with five tabs (Home, Study, AI Tools, Wellness, Profile) that highlight the active route using Vedansh brand colors.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer displaying the Vedansh brand, NEP 2020 badge, social media links, quick navigation links, and the founder's profile (Mrityunjay Pandey).
frontend/src/components/GovtApprovedBadg: Small reusable badge component that renders a green 'Govt. Approved' pill with a check-circle icon in three configurable sizes.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, theme toggle, notification bell, and Internet Identity login/logout button, including a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Authenticated app layout wrapping routed pages with a Header, main content outlet, and a BottomNavBar.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects a new user's name and phone number on first login, then saves the profile and student record via the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing page layout wrapping routed pages with a Header and Footer, without a bottom nav bar.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profile, student info, leaderboard, quiz scores, and streaks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens, and reusable utility classes like glass-card and gradient helpers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static about page for Vedansh Education & Technology displaying the platform's mission, values, milestones, and NEP 2020 compliance highlights.
frontend/src/pages/AcademicSection.tsx: Academic content page allowing students to select a class (Class 1–12 and BTech branches) and browse subjects with tabs for notes, videos, and downloads.
frontend/src/pages/AIToolsHub.tsx: A multi-tab AI tools page offering a math problem solver, grammar checker, vocabulary builder, and reading comprehension exercises with mock/simulated AI responses.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Phone-based OTP authentication page with a two-step flow (phone entry then 6-digit OTP verification) that stores the phone number in localStorage on success.
frontend/src/pages/CompetitiveExams.tsx: Competitive exams hub page listing 50+ Indian exams across categories (engineering, medical, civil services, SSC, banking, railways, police) with search and expandable category cards.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing personalized greeting, streak tracking, quick navigation cards, subject progress bars, and upcoming quizzes. Fetches user profile and student data, updates daily streak via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/EducationTools.tsx: Education tools page with tabs for a mock code editor (multi-language), bubble sort algorithm visualizer, circuit component reference, and CAD parts list. Simulates code execution with mock outputs and step-by-step algorithm animation.
frontend/src/pages/GovernmentResources.t: Page listing Indian government jobs, scholarships, and schemes in tabbed sections with eligibility, deadlines, and amounts. Includes a dialog for detail views and external links to official sources.
frontend/src/pages/InteractiveQuizzes.ts: Timed quiz page supporting multiple subjects (Math, Science, English, GK) with per-question explanations, score saving via React Query, and a leaderboard tab. Tracks answers, calculates scores, and displays results with medal rankings.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public marketing landing page featuring a hero section, animated count-up stats, feature cards, and testimonials. Uses IntersectionObserver to trigger stat animations and links to app sections.
frontend/src/pages/NCERTLibrary.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable NCERT book library organized by class (1–12) with book metadata (chapters, pages) and actions for downloading, playing, and marking books as complete.
frontend/src/pages/PlacementPrep.tsx: Provides a BTech placement preparation page with company listings, DSA topic progress tracking, aptitude resources, and a resume builder form, filterable by engineering branch.
frontend/src/pages/SplashScreen.tsx: Animated splash screen that sequences logo, brand name, and tagline reveal over ~3 seconds before automatically navigating to the home route.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessHub.tsx: Student wellness page featuring a Pomodoro timer, daily goal tracker, motivational quotes, achievement badges, study groups, and health tips.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Vedansh Education frontend, extending the theme with custom brand colors (navy, orange, gold), fonts (Poppins, Baloo 2), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and integrating typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 3) for the Vedansh Education & Technology app, documenting the tech stack, brand guidelines, architectural notes, required images, and a list of all existing implemented features across 13+ pages.
